title: Q3 All-Hands Meeting Scheduled
body: Join us this Friday at 4:00 PM NPT for the Q3 all-hands. We'll cover roadmap updates, team shoutouts, and an open Q&A with leadership. Calendar invites have been sent.
author: David Berg

title: Updated Remote Work Policy
body: Starting next month, employees can work remotely up to 4 days a week. Please review the updated policy document on the intranet and acknowledge it by end of week.
author: Emily Chen

title: Office Closed for Dashain Holiday
body: The Kathmandu office will be closed from Oct 12-16 in observance of Dashain. Please plan your handovers accordingly.
author: Emily Chen

title: New Health Insurance Provider
body: We've partnered with a new health insurance provider offering expanded coverage. HR will host an info session next Tuesday.
author: Emily Chen

title: Scheduled Maintenance: Internal Tools
body: Internal tools (VPN, Jira, Confluence) will be unavailable Saturday 2 AM - 5 AM NPT for scheduled maintenance.
author: Tomás Alvarez

title: Welcome New Hires!
body: Please join us in welcoming 4 new team members who joined this month across Engineering and Design. Say hi in #welcome!
author: Emily Chen
